name: filter-records-by-client
query: Find all pending documents for client CPA-210 in Airtable.
expected_behavior: Satisfies the schema gate (Quick Reference, docs/airtable-schema.md, or a no-filter probe) before building filterByFormula
Uses curl with --data-urlencode for the filtered read, not Python urllib
Wraps lookup/linked fields in SEARCH/FIND/ARRAYJOIN instead of bare '='
Formats the result as a clean table/summary, not a raw JSON dump
_notes: Positive trigger: direct Airtable record query with base/table/field ID vocabulary.
